modules.name: AI Maturity Screener
modules.purpose: Assess an organization's AI maturity stage (0-5) and recommend next steps.
when_to_use: User wants to evaluate where a client sits on the AI maturity curve
User asks for a structured readiness or capability assessment
User needs stage-appropriate recommendations after a discovery call
example_queries: Run a maturity assessment for a regional bank
What stage is a client that has pilots but no production AI?
Assess our AI readiness and tell me what to do next

modules.name: Asset Library
modules.purpose: Browse and retrieve reference architectures, patterns, and templates from the vault.
when_to_use: User wants to find an existing asset by industry, stage, or type
User asks what reference architectures or templates are available
User needs a starting artifact for an engagement
example_queries: Show me healthcare RAG reference architectures
Find a discovery workshop template
What fraud detection patterns do we have?

modules.name: Engagement Kit Builder
modules.purpose: Assemble a tailored engagement kit (assets, templates, checklists) for a client context.
when_to_use: User wants a bundled set of assets for a specific engagement
User asks to package deliverables for a client kickoff
User needs a downloadable starter kit from current context
example_queries: Build a kit for a fintech fraud-scoring engagement
Assemble onboarding materials for a healthcare client
Create an engagement kit from this assessment

modules.name: Governance & Risk Checker
modules.purpose: Check a proposed AI use case against governance and risk controls; flag gaps.
when_to_use: User wants a pre-delivery governance or risk pass
User asks whether a use case meets internal AI controls
User needs a risk checklist applied to a design
example_queries: Run a governance check on a credit-scoring model
What risks should we flag for a clinical decision-support tool?
Check this use case against our AI risk controls

modules.name: Knowledge Contribution
modules.purpose: Capture, structure, and curate new knowledge assets contributed by consultants.
when_to_use: User wants to contribute a new asset or lesson to the vault
User asks to formalize a pattern they used on an engagement
User needs help structuring content to schema before submission
example_queries: Help me contribute a new solution pattern
Turn my engagement notes into a reusable template
Submit this architecture to the asset library

modules.name: Community & Enablement Hub
modules.purpose: Surface community discussions, enablement resources, and peer expertise.
when_to_use: User wants to find who has worked on a topic or industry
User asks for enablement materials or community threads
User needs to connect with peers on a problem
example_queries: Who has experience with manufacturing predictive maintenance?
Find enablement resources on Bedrock
Show recent community discussions on agents

modules.name: Skills & Tools Repository
modules.purpose: Recommend tools and frameworks fit for a given context, stage, and constraints.
when_to_use: User wants a tool recommendation for a specific scenario
User asks to compare frameworks for an implementation
User needs stage-appropriate tooling guidance
example_queries: What vector database should we use for a small RAG pilot?
Recommend an orchestration framework for a multi-agent system
Which tools fit a stage-2 organization?

modules.name: Q&A
modules.purpose: Answer knowledge questions from the vault with citations.
when_to_use: User asks a factual question that the vault can answer
User wants a cited answer across multiple assets
User needs a quick lookup with sources
example_queries: What does the EU AI Act say about high-risk systems?
How do we handle PII in a RAG pipeline?
Summarize our guidance on model evaluation

modules.name: CoE Copilot (Chat Interface)
modules.purpose: Front-door conversational orchestrator that routes intent across all modules.
when_to_use: User starts a conversation without a specific module in mind
User intent spans multiple modules and needs routing
User wants a narrated, cited response composed from several sources
example_queries: Help me prepare for a client kickoff next week
I need to assess a client and then build a kit
What should I know about AI compliance for fintech?

modules.name: Analytics Dashboard
modules.purpose: Surface usage, adoption, and engagement analytics across the platform.
when_to_use: User wants metrics on platform or asset usage
User asks which assets or modules are most used
User needs an adoption snapshot
example_queries: Which assets were used most this quarter?
Show adoption metrics for the asset library
How many assessments were run last month?

modules.name: Prompt Engineering Studio
modules.purpose: Browse, fork, version, and refine reusable prompt templates.
when_to_use: User wants a prompt template for a consulting task
User asks to fork and adapt an existing prompt
User needs to compare prompt versions
example_queries: Find a prompt for facilitating a use-case prioritization workshop
Fork the executive briefing prompt and tune it for healthcare
Show me prompt templates for risk assessment

modules.name: AI Use Case Ideation Engine
modules.purpose: Generate and rank candidate AI use cases for a client context.
when_to_use: User wants ideas for where AI could help a client
User asks to prioritize a backlog of use cases
User needs value/effort-ranked candidates
example_queries: Suggest AI use cases for a mid-size retailer
Prioritize these use cases by value and feasibility
What high-impact AI opportunities exist in claims processing?

modules.name: Vendor & Model Evaluation Center
modules.purpose: Compare LLM providers, vector databases, and platforms against weighted criteria.
when_to_use: User wants a side-by-side vendor or model comparison
User asks which model fits a workload and budget
User needs a structured evaluation matrix
example_queries: Compare Claude, GPT, and Gemini for document analysis
Pinecone vs pgvector vs S3 Vectors for a pilot
Which model is most cost-effective for summarization?

modules.name: Client-Facing Maturity Report Portal
modules.purpose: Generate a polished, client-ready maturity report (PDF) from an assessment.
when_to_use: User wants a client-presentable report from an assessment
User asks to export findings as a branded PDF
User needs an executive-ready maturity summary
example_queries: Generate a client report from this assessment
Export the maturity findings as a PDF
Create an executive summary for the client

modules.name: AI News & Radar Feed
modules.purpose: Radar view of AI news and emerging tech (served by the intelligence-feed agent, AGENT-23).
when_to_use: User wants a quick radar of what's new in AI
User asks for adopt/trial/assess/hold guidance on a technology
User needs a curated news digest
example_queries: What's new in AI this week?
Where does the radar place small language models?
Show me recent model releases worth watching

modules.name: Engagement Retrospective Tracker
modules.purpose: Capture engagement retrospectives and extract reusable insights.
when_to_use: User wants to run or record an engagement retrospective
User asks to extract lessons learned from a project
User needs to find precedent from past retros
example_queries: Capture a retro for the fraud-scoring engagement
What lessons have we learned from healthcare RAG projects?
Extract insights from this project debrief

modules.name: Personal Dashboard
modules.purpose: Personalized landing view: recent activity, saved assets, and suggested next steps.
when_to_use: User wants their personalized home view
User asks what they were working on or what's next
User needs quick access to saved or recent items
example_queries: Show my dashboard
What was I working on last?
What should I do next?

modules.name: AI Project Health Monitor
modules.purpose: Assess the health of an AI delivery project and flag risks early.
when_to_use: User wants a health check on an in-flight project
User asks what risks threaten a delivery timeline
User needs a RAG-status view of project signals
example_queries: How healthy is the retail recommendation project?
What risks are emerging on this engagement?
Give me a project health summary

modules.name: Decision Log
modules.purpose: Record architecture and engagement decisions and surface relevant precedent.
when_to_use: User wants to log a decision with its rationale
User asks what was decided previously on a topic
User needs precedent for a recurring choice
example_queries: Log our decision to use S3 Vectors over Pinecone
Have we decided on a default embedding model before?
Show decisions related to vector databases

modules.name: Certification & Badging
modules.purpose: Track consultant learning paths, certifications, and earned badges.
when_to_use: User wants to see or pursue a certification path
User asks what badges they have or can earn
User needs a learning recommendation
example_queries: What certifications can I earn on AI governance?
Show my current badges
What's the next step in my learning path?

modules.name: AI Ethics & Bias Checker
modules.purpose: Review a use case for ethical risks and potential bias; recommend mitigations.
when_to_use: User wants an ethics or fairness review of a use case
User asks about bias risks in a model or dataset
User needs mitigation recommendations
example_queries: Review a hiring-screening model for bias
What fairness risks exist in credit decisioning?
Run an ethics check on this use case

modules.name: Client Benchmark Comparator
modules.purpose: Compare a client's maturity and metrics against peer benchmarks.
when_to_use: User wants to benchmark a client against peers
User asks how a client compares to industry norms
User needs a benchmark visualization or export
example_queries: How does this bank compare to peers on AI maturity?
Benchmark our client against industry stage averages
Show a peer comparison for retail

modules.name: Consultant Onboarding Journey
modules.purpose: Guide a new consultant through a personalized onboarding path.
when_to_use: User is new and needs an onboarding path
User asks where to start learning the platform or domain
User needs role-tailored ramp-up guidance
example_queries: I'm new — where do I start?
Give me an onboarding plan for an AI delivery consultant
What should I learn first?

modules.name: AI Intelligence Feed & Release Radar
modules.purpose: Personalized feed of AI developments with CoE commentary and release radar.
when_to_use: User wants a personalized AI intelligence feed
User asks what a development means for their work
User needs curated, commented updates
example_queries: Show my AI intelligence feed
What does the latest embedding model release mean for us?
Curate recent AI news relevant to healthcare

modules.name: Global AI Regulation & Compliance Tracker
modules.purpose: Look up AI regulations by geography and industry; track compliance obligations.
when_to_use: User wants the regulations that apply to a use case
User asks about compliance obligations by region or industry
User needs a regulatory summary for a client
example_queries: What regulations apply to AI in EU healthcare?
Summarize HIPAA implications for an AI scribe
Which US rules cover AI in financial services?

modules.name: Universal Asset Q&A
modules.purpose: Chat with any single asset or document ("chat with anything").
when_to_use: User wants to ask questions about one specific asset
User asks to summarize or interrogate a single document
User needs focused Q&A scoped to one file
example_queries: Summarize this reference architecture
What are the key risks called out in this checklist?
Ask questions about the fraud-scoring pattern

modules.name: SDLC Accelerator
modules.purpose: Accelerate the full AI delivery SDLC — design docs, specs, tests, and code — from a reference architecture (Opus, cost-capped).
when_to_use: User wants to generate design docs, specs, tests, or starter code from an architecture
User asks to scaffold an implementation across the SDLC
User needs runnable boilerplate, test suites, or spec drafts aligned to a pattern
example_queries: Generate a FastAPI + Lambda starter from the healthcare RAG architecture
Scaffold a Python project for the fraud-scoring pattern
Create starter code for a Bedrock RAG service

modules.name: Agentic Skills & Plugin Exchange
modules.purpose: Browse and install reusable agentic-dev skills, slash-commands, MCP servers, and plugin/prompt packs for Claude Code, Claude Cowork, GitHub Copilot, and Kiro.
when_to_use: User wants a Claude Code skill, slash-command, or MCP server for a task
User asks what plugins or prompt packs exist for an agentic dev tool
User needs install steps for a shared skill or extension
example_queries: Find a Claude Code skill for security review
What MCP servers do we have for AWS?
Show Copilot setups for our standard stack

modules.name: AI Project ROI Calculator
modules.purpose: Estimate the cost, expected value, ROI, and payback period for a proposed AI project.
when_to_use: User wants a business case or ROI estimate for an AI initiative
User asks what an AI project will cost and return
User needs payback/break-even numbers to justify an engagement
example_queries: Estimate ROI for an AI document-processing project
What's the payback period for a fraud-scoring build?
Build a business case for a RAG assistant

modules.name: AI SOW Generator
modules.purpose: Draft a statement of work (objectives, scope, deliverables, timeline, assumptions) for an AI engagement.
when_to_use: User wants a draft SOW for an AI engagement
User asks to formalize scope and deliverables into a contract document
User needs a timeline and assumptions section for a proposal
example_queries: Draft an SOW for a healthcare RAG pilot
Generate a statement of work for a 6-week fraud-scoring build
Write scope and deliverables for an AI assessment engagement

modules.name: Vendor Vetting
modules.purpose: Vet and manage AI vendors — security posture, data handling, compliance certifications, and approval status — for engagement use.
when_to_use: User wants to vet an AI vendor before using it on an engagement
User asks whether a vendor meets the security and compliance bar
User needs the approval status or risk tier for a vendor
example_queries: Vet this LLM vendor for a healthcare engagement
What's the approval status of our vector DB vendors?
Which vendors are cleared for PII workloads?
